title: Multiple-choice cloze
description: Read the text below and decide which answer (A, B, C or D) best fits each gap.

content.text: In what can only be described as an impressive (0) ...... of research, a schoolboy in the USA has calculated that the state and federal governments could save getting on for $400m a year by changing the typeface they use for printed documents.||Shocked by the number of printed handouts he was receiving from his teachers, the 14-year-old boy decided to investigate the cost. He established that ink (1) ...... up to 60% of the cost of a printed page and is, gram for gram, twice as expensive as some famous perfumes. He then started looking at the different typefaces and discovered that, by (2) ...... to one called Garamond with its thin, elegant strokes, his school district could reduce its ink (3) ...... by 24% annually. Working on that (4) ......, the federal savings would be enormous.||(5) ......, earlier studies of the (6) ...... of font choice have shown that it can affect more than just cost. The typeface that a document uses also (7) ...... how much of the information is (8) ...... and whether it is worth taking seriously.

example.explanation: La respuesta correcta es 'piece'. 'Piece of research' es una colocación común que significa 'una investigación'.

questions.explanation: 'Accounts for' significa 'representa' o 'constituye'. Es la opción correcta porque 'account for' es la frase verbal que significa 'ser la causa de' o 'constituir'.
'Switching to' significa 'cambiar a'. Es la opción más natural para cambiar de un tipo de letra a otro.
'Ink consumption' es la expresión más formal y técnica para 'consumo de tinta'. 'Consumption' se refiere a la cantidad que se usa.
'On that basis' significa 'sobre esa base' o 'a partir de ese principio'. Es la expresión fija correcta.
'Interestingly' significa 'curiosamente' o 'es interesante que'. Conecta con la idea de que ya se habían hecho estudios antes sin que se hubiera actuado.
'Issue' aquí significa 'tema' o 'asunto', con connotación de que es algo que se debate o analiza. Es más formal que 'topic'.
'Influences' significa 'influye'. Es el verbo más adecuado porque el tipo de letra influye en cómo se retiene la información, no la controla directamente.
'Retained' significa 'retenida' en el sentido de memoria. 'Information is retained' es la expresión correcta para decir que la información se recuerda.
